zh.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen Pollock de Pencaitland於1265年6月5日出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可時，她的父親Petrus de Pollock35歲，母親Alice Pearson23歲。她於1280年之前與Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1304年10月4日在她的家鄉享年39歲。

zh-hans.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen Pollock de Pencaitland于1265年6月5日出生在苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可时，她的父亲Petrus de Pollock35岁，母亲Alice Pearson23岁。她于1280年之前与Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1304年10月4日在她的家乡享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pollock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Glasgow, probably a British Celtic name derived from pull-, poll- ‘pool’ + a diminutive suffix. The surname has been established in northeast Ulster since the 17th century.
German: ethnic name for someone from Poland.

variants.name: Pogue
meanings: Irish (Cavan): shortened form of the Scottish name Pollock 1, Gaelicized as Polóc, later assimilated to the Irish word póg ‘kiss’.

variants.name: Pollick
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Pollock  . This surname is rare in Britain.
Americanized form of Slovenian Polič, Croatian and Serbian Polić (see Polich ). Compare Polick .

variants.name: Palk
meanings: English (Devon): shortened form of Pollock , with unrounding of the vowel to give Palk. Compare Polk and also Pulford . Derivation from a shortened form of the Middle English personal names Palcok and Palkin (pet forms of Paul) is formally possible, but no evidence has been found to substantiate this.

variants.name: Paulk
meanings: English (Devon) and Scottish: shortened form of   Pollock  . The Scottish name is a variant of   Polk  .
Altered form of a German surname, possibly   Paulke  .

variants.name: Polk
meanings: Sorbian (Półk and Pólk): probably from a short form of a personal name based on Old Slavic plъkъ ‘crowd, army’ (see Polka 3).
East German (of Slavic origin): variant of   Polke  .

variants.name: Pollok
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire): variant of   Pollock  .

variants.name: Polak
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Miroslaw, Zbigniew, Boguslawa, Dorota, Jacek, Andrzej, Bogdan, Eugeniusz, Grzegorz, Irena, Jerzy, Jozef.

Polish and Jewish (Ashkenazic); Czech, Slovak, and Hungarian (Polák, Slovak also Poľák): ethnic name for someone from Poland (Polish Polak, Slovak archaic and Czech Polák). In the case of the Ashkenazic name, the reference is to a Jew from Poland. This surname is also found in Germany, where it is also of Sorbian origin (see 3 below), and in the Netherlands. Compare Poliak , Poljak , and Polyak .

Slovenian and Croatian: topographic name for someone who lived in open country, derived from polje ‘field’, or a habitational name for someone from any of numerous places called Polje, named with this word. It may also be e.g. an occupational name for a field guard (see Poljak ).

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen Pollock de Pencaitland was born on 5 June 1265, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Petrus de Pollock, was 35 and her mother, Alice Pearson, was 23. She married Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock before 1280. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 4 October 1304, in her hometown, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helen Pollock de Pencaitland est née le 5 juin 1265, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Petrus de Pollock, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Pearson, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock avant 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 octobre 1304, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helen Pollock de Pencaitland am 5. Juni 1265 in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Petrus de Pollock 35 und ihre Mutter Alice Pearson 23. Sie hat vor 1280 Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Oktober 1304 im Alter von 39 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Pollock de Pencaitland è nata il il 5 giugno 1265 nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, Petrus de Pollock, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Alice Pearson, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock prima del 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 ottobre 1304, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Helen Pollock de Pencaitland(이)가 1265년 6월 5일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Petrus de Pollock(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Pearson(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1280년 이전 Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1304년 10월 4일 그녀의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock antes 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1304, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen Pollock de Pencaitland родилась 5 июня 1265 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Petrus de Pollock было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Pearson, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock перед 1280 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 4 октября 1304 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 39 лет.

Se casó con Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock antes de 1280. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1304, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años.
